ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sample was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the sample was collected */,
  "parent_sample_id" TEXT /* Parent sample ID (if applicable) */,
  "field_sample_volume" REAL /* Field sample volume in liters */,
  "domain_filter_volume" REAL /* Domain filter volume in liters */,
  "total_AFDM" REAL /* Total AFDM (Ash-Free Dry Mass) in grams */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the sample was collected (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "habitat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat type where the sample was collected */,
  "algal_sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algal sample type */,
  "substratum_size_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substratum size class */,
  "benthic_area" REAL /* Benthic area in square meters */,
  "sample_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sampling method used */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., water, algal) */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_substratum_size_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("substratum_size_class_id") REFERENCES substratum_size_classes ("substratum_size_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("sample_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_habitat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_type_id") REFERENCES habitat_types ("habitat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_algal_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("algal_sample_type_id") REFERENCES algal_sample_types ("algal_sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., river, lake) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_types" (
  "habitat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type (e.g., riffle, pool) */,
  "habitat_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the habitat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algal_sample_types" (
  "algal_sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algal sample type */,
  "algal_sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algal sample type (e.g., epilithon, epipelon) */,
  "algal_sample_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the algal sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algal_sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substratum_size_classes" (
  "substratum_size_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substratum size class */,
  "substratum_size_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the substratum size class (e.g., cobble, sand) */,
  "substratum_size_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the substratum size class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substratum_size_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_methods" (
  "sample_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling method */,
  "sample_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling method */,
  "sample_method_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sampling method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_samples, download_samples) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "sample_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sample version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
